feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Cloud
feed.subtitle: ABAP Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: i am working with LTAP table i want to change certificate number
entry.content: I am working with LTAP table I want to change certificate number but while creating the Transfer order for the same delivery it always getting the same first certificate number which i don't want to use i want to edit certificate number from where i can change the certificate number of LTAP table .Is there is any way to change the Certificate number because it is automatically fetching the first certificate number .

entry.title: Updating delivery texts and insert forwarding agent after doing PGI
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

Our client has a requirement that we need to update the texts in the delivery after doing PGI in the Cloud. Also, it is critical for us to be able to enter the shipper in the delivery even after doing PGI. In the cloud, in the Change Outbound Delivery VL02N app, even going from view to edit, I do not have the ability to add the shipper in the partner tab or the texts in the texts tab.

The delivery text needs to be updated after doing PGI without changing the delivery note/transport document created.

Can anyone tell me the steps to take to solve this problem?

Thank you and best regards,

entry.title: CBO Service is not permitted when deploying to S/4 Cloud Dev Tenant
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

I created a simple custom UI5 app in BAS and used the CBO service as my backend. Everything was working fine until I tried to deploy it to the DEV tenant. I encountered the following error: 'The use of Gateway OData V2 Service YY1_****_CDS 0001 is not permitted.'

I suspect the cause of the problem is because the CBO is under the Key-User extensibility model. Is there a way to fix this? Thanks.

Best Regards,

Emman

entry.title: Applying Screen Persona to all users and transport it to subsequent systems in S4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, we have enhanced standard gui transaction VA01 and added few fields into it. Now the tab name by default comes as "Custom Fields" . We have used screen persona in s4 public cloud and changed the tab name.

1. Is there any other way to change the tab name other than screen persona?

2. If no, how to apply this persona to all the users having access to tcode and also would like to transport the same to other systems. 

Just to add for std. app of type UI5 transporting and applying it to all the users is working for us. we are facing issue specifically for gui type transactions like VA22, VA01 etc.

entry.title: Question regarding Brown Field Key User Extensibility and leveraging ABAP Managed Fields in CFLs.
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Greetings 🙂

I have a question regarding Brown Field Key User Extensibility and leveraging custom database fields (ABAP Managed Fields) in Custom Fields and Logic (CFL).

Specifically, I'm wondering:

1. Upgrade Safety: If we use the GUI T-code SUFD_EUI to prepare custom database fields (ABAP Managed Fields) to use in CFL, will these prepared fields remain upgrade-safe? Are there any limitations or potential compatibility issues we should be aware of?


2. Alternative Approaches: Are there any alternative methods to leverage existing ABAP Managed Fields into CFL?

Thanks in advance for your insights!

 

 ABAP Extensibility

entry.title: SemanticObject related Annotations and their Use.
entry.content:
I am trying to understand how to use the Semantic Objects to Navigate across the Apps, while using ABAP Cloud CDS while having limited knowledge of Fiori Elements. I went through various posts and portals, but I could not gain complete clarity on the topic.

I came across the following annotation examples on multiple links including Navigation from an App (Outbound Navigation) - Documentation - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK (ondemand.com) :

1.

UI.LineItem: [{ semanticObject: 'EPMProduct', semanticObjectAction: 'manage_st', label: 'IBNWithContext', requiresContext: true, type: #FOR_INTENT_BASED_NAVIGATION }]

2. 

@UI.lineItem: [ { label: 'My Button for navigation', semanticObjectAction: 'manage', type: #FOR_INTENT_BASED_NAVIGATION } ]

@Consumption.semanticObject: 'MySemanticObject'

 

Questions:

1. How does the use case differ between using the SemanticObject property under UI.LineItem and Consumption annotations.

2. I am asked to provide the name of the SemanticObject and SemanticObjectAction while created the application in Business Application Studio. Should I refer to this Semantic Object in my ABAP CDS to navigate to the corresponding app, which I am not sure how it will work, or can Semantic Object and its Action be also specified in the ABAP layer as well? (Most posts online show the creation of Semantic Objects using TCode, which is not feasible on ABAP Cloud)

3. Going deeper into my confusion on the above 2 questions, how do I specify the name of my Semantic Object (if possible within ABAP), and how do I specify the reference to it?

4. Is it possible or i there a use case for specifying multiple Actions for the same Semantic Object, since in every example, I just saw one SemanticObjectAction?

 

It would be really helpful if someone could clear my concept, or help me with the links for the same, as I couldn't find clarity from the available info online.

Thank You.

entry.title: Issues with Github Repo Pull request.
entry.content:
The Pull request on the repository  for SAP-samples/abap-platform-code-samples-cloud: Collection of sample code to demonstrate ABAP for cloud development. (github.com) results in the following errors:

 

Is there a resolution for the same?

Thanks

entry.title: RAP Populating the deep entity structure in Behavior Implementation class
entry.content:
I have created an RAP BO and implemented an action with a deep table parameter. I achieved this using a CDS Abstract Entity Hierarchy found it in help.sap.com( https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/modeling-parameters-for-non-standard-operations?locale=en-US&source=redirect ) .

For fetching data, I utilized a Function Module (FM) which I called inside the Behavior implementation class, passing the data into the result tab. However, I am encountering an issue with a requirement where 2 internal tables and one header are needed in the result tab of the action.

I have successfully transferred header data into %param, but I am facing difficulties with the line item data. Automatic code completion is not helping, and I haven't found any relevant blogs to reference.



 Your assistance in resolving this issue would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: RAP: Derived types not showing up in behavior pool for save methods
entry.content:
Team,


System: S4 1909 FPS02


I am not able to get the derived types in saver methods.

 


Ideally the type should be something like Entity\\child but instead i am getting type data.

I have no issues with behavior handler methods


Regards,
Vishnu

entry.title: ABAP Enviornment in BTP FETCH API (direct DB access) is not supported for entity <AnalyticEntity>
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have created analytic query in SAP ABAP enviornment in BTP, When i try to preview the service binding, i get error "FETCH API (direct DB access) is not supported for entity <Analytic Query Name>"

This is very strange, If SAP do not allow the same, Why preview is enabled?

entry.title: Cap app - accessing endpoint using destination giving unauthorized(Oauth2clientcredentials)
entry.content:
Trying to call a URL using destination. It is setup as OAuth2ClientCredentials with token url, client id and client secret.

It works from postman and also from test.http by getting bearer token.

But if called from BTP destination in CAP app - it does'nt work. It is returning - Unauthorized when run in debug or from terminal.

entry.title: Communication Arrangement Check Connection Failed
entry.content:
Hello, 

 I am following the tutorial  to read values from On premise system into ABAP Cloud.    https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-env-rfc.html

At the Step 8 Create Communication Arrangement . when i click on the Check connection. I am getting the message as The ping of the outbound service has failed.

1. In the Communication Systems --> General --> Host Name is same as the hostname that comes up in the browser when i run the transaction /ui2/flp  

 

2.  The Target Host Is same as the Destination Configuration -> URL < Host Name >

3. I checked the user credentials in the on premise system and the user credentials provided in Communication Systems --> Users for Outbound Communication  are the same. The same credentials are used in Cloud Connector also.   

4. When I Check the connection from Communication Arrangement . I am getting the error saying The ping of the outbound service has failed. In the error log it says the issue is in the service APS_COM_CA2_SRV .

Please help me resolve this issue. Also, Is there any better approach to connect to on premises S4HANA system . Thanks for your time and help.

entry.title: How to create application test users without s-account info - SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have created few RAP Application in BTP ABAP and would like to test these apps using test users. 

Can we able to create some users without s-account ?

Note: this is for productive account not for trail account

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards,

Muthu

entry.title: Service Registration in SAP Gateway is disabled
entry.content:
Hey,

I've created  project in SEGW with CDS.

and I generated it - 

Now, I want to register it but it's disabled.

I tried to create service in tcode:  /n/iwfnd/maint_Service.

I assume , that now this service should show up in the SEGW and then relate it.

But, it's not showing up.

Please advice how to continue from this point.

Thank you.

entry.title: Simulate creation of RFQ using RAP BO
entry.content:
Hi,

Previously, we are using BAPI_QUOTATION_CREATEFROMDATA2 to simulate the creation of the quotation. When using the RAP BO(https://api.sap.com/bointerface/I_REQUESTFORQUOTATIONTP), do we have any equivalent functionality? Like if there are during the MODIFY ENTITIES statement, we can call the ROLLBACK ENTITIES? Or is there an equivalent operation/API to do this?

entry.title: ABAP on BTP Trial Instance creation is getting Failed
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to create ABAP instance in BTP Trial account.I have tried deleting entire trial account. But nothing helps.

I am getting following error:

Service broker error: Service broker abap-trial-broker failed with: Internal Server Error.

 

Tried creating via Booster then deleted whole Subaccount ,Space everything again tried to creating through Service market place still failing,

I was able to create successfully two days back and today that instance was currently not available.So tried recreating and ended up getting failed.

 

 

 

 

Please help.

entry.title: Creating Dynamic Parameters in Fiori's Application Job App
entry.content:
I have a report which i want to schedule as a background job with the Application Job App in Fiori Launchpad. 

In the SAP GUI i have created so far the application job catalog entry and the application job template. The parameters from the report were synchronized automatically. However, in the report when I look at it in the SAP GUI there is a parameter which is a drop down fields and depending on the value selected in the drop down field, different fields appear. Is there a way to achieve that in the Application Job App UI in Fiori Launchpad? Maybe with check classes?

entry.title: Problem with creating of a Service Instance for an ABAP development (BTP)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m currently facing an issue while creating a service instance, which is preventing me from generating a Service Key for ABAP development on the BTP Cockpit Cloud.

Initially, I attempted an automatic process to create the service instance, but unfortunately, it failed. Consequently, I decided to create it manually, but encountered the same problem. Regrettably, there are no specific error details provided, leaving me uncertain about the root cause and the necessary steps for resolution.

Then I tried to delete all my registered attempts one by one, but it failed as well. 

Has anyone encountered a similar issue? If so, any insights or technical guidance would be greatly appreciated. I’ve also explored various forum posts related to this problem, but unfortunately, none of them provided useful information concerning my particular problem.

For context, I’ve attached some screenshots to help illustrate the situation.

Thank you in advance for your assistance

 

1.

2.

entry.title: Trying to access SAP HANA DB from SAP ABAP on Cloud
entry.content:
HI,

I am trying to access a few tables in HANA DB from a program in my ABAP Cloud, but am unable to access the tables in the DB. I get the following error  (Error: "CW_ACTIVITY" is not declared as a table, projection view, or database view in ABAP Dictionary or does not exist in an active version.)

I reached out to SAP for help, but as the ABAP version procured for the system is a trial version it was not of much help. Can someone kindly tell me whether it is possible to connect to ABAP(trial) cloud via HANA DB and if so how to do the same?

Thanks for the help.

Regards,

Rohith Ramesh

entry.title: Error when trying to create a package in Eclipe - ABAP Cloud BTP
entry.content:
Hello everybody,
I have the following error when trying to create a package in Eclipe connected to SAP BTP: System setting does not allow changes to be made to object DEVC.

Can someone help me please?

Thanks
